title: Homework #3 Hints
content:
Hi Class,

Here are some hints for HW #3:

Question 2) 

Need to know EPS Equations. They all use AFTER tax numbers. 

Overall EPS Equations = (Net Income - Preferred Dividends Paid) / W. Avg. Shares of Common Stock

 

If you have Disc Ops...

EPS for Continuing Ops = (Income from Continuing Ops, after tax - Preferred Dividends Paid) / W. Avg. Shares of Common Stock

EPS for Disc Ops = (Income & Gain Loss from Disc Ops, after tax) / W, Avg Shares of Common Stock

 

* Make sure you understand the equations. You can ignore dividends paid to Common Shareholders. You can also ignore # of preferred stock. 

 

Question 6)

Tricky Ones:
4) Cash Surrender value of life insurance = It is an asset, they classify it as Investments

6) Current Maturities of Bond Payable: Key word current.

18) Land held for speculation: You are not using the land, rather you are trying to make money with it. 

 

-Jeremiah

Hi Class,

Here are some hints for HW #3:
Question 2) 
Need to know EPS Equations. They all use AFTER tax numbers. 
Overall EPS Equations = (Net Income - Preferred Dividends Paid) / W. Avg. Shares of Common Stock
 
If you have Disc Ops...
EPS for Continuing Ops = (Income from Continuing Ops, after tax - Preferred Dividends Paid) / W. Avg. Shares of Common Stock
EPS for Disc Ops = (Income & Gain Loss from Disc Ops, after tax) / W, Avg Shares of Common Stock
 
* Make sure you understand the equations. You can ignore dividends paid to Common Shareholders. You can also ignore # of preferred stock. 
 
Question 6)
Tricky Ones:4) Cash Surrender value of life insurance = It is an asset, they classify it as Investments
6) Current Maturities of Bond Payable: Key word current.
18) Land held for speculation: You are not using the land, rather you are trying to make money with it.

author: Jeremiah Contreras
